title: StreetHomelessCount
description: An AGGREGATE count of unsheltered / street-homeless individuals — the observational measure of homelessness outside the shelter system. Canonical schema reconciling the 'Directory Of Unsheltered Street Homeless To General Population Ratio' datasets (483x-fy9e 2012, ivbu-e2q7 2011, 8kiv-2ukd 2010, x56h-7iwp 2009), the quarterly 'Local Law 19 of 1999 Report - Quarterly Unsheltered Street Homeless Individuals' (7tu6-bcih), and 'Directory Of Homeless Population By Year' (5t4n-d72c). Counts only — never individual people. This is the read-side twin of the net-new OutreachRequest write surface.

period.description: Year or quarter the count covers.

unshelteredCount.description: Estimated unsheltered / street-homeless individuals for the area and period.

generalPopulation.description: General population used as the ratio denominator.
